project_privacy_data_flows.description: User submits text search query to Wikipedia. Query sent to MediaWiki API via fullTextSearch or prefixSearch endpoints. Results include page descriptions, thumbnails, and coordinates.

flow_steps.details: SearchActivity starts with query source (intent share, process text, or manual input). Instrumentation funnel begins.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&converttitles=&prop=description|pageimages|pageprops|coordinates|info&generator=search&gsrnamespace=0&gsrwhat=text") suspend fun fullTextSearch(@Query("gsrsearch") searchTerm: String?, @Query("gsrlimit") gsrLimit: Int, @Query("gsroffset") gsrOffset: Int?)
flow_steps.details: Full search query sent to MediaWiki API. Search term included as gsrsearch parameter. Returns page descriptions, coordinates, thumbnails.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&redirects=&converttitles=&prop=description|pageimages|coordinates|info&generator=prefixsearch") suspend fun prefixSearch(@Query("gpssearch") searchTerm: String?, @Query("gpslimit") maxResults: Int, @Query("gpsoffset") gpsOffset: Int?)
flow_steps.details: Prefix search (autocomplete) sends partial query as user types.
Search results displayed with descriptions, images. Clicking a result creates a HistoryEntry and opens PageActivity.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: Search via PROCESS_TEXT intent allows receiving selected text from other apps. Also supports ACTION_SEND to receive shared text for search queries.

flow_steps.code: public override fun createFragment(): SearchFragment { ... Intent.ACTION_SEND == intent.action -> { source = InvokeSource.INTENT_SHARE }; Intent.ACTION_PROCESS_TEXT == intent.action -> { source = InvokeSource.INTENT_PROCESS_TEXT } }
flow_steps.details: External text received from other apps via Android intent system (ACTION_SEND or PROCESS_TEXT). Used as search query.
Received external text transmitted to Wikipedia API as search query.
